title: MailerLite vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
h1: MailerLite vs Campaign Monitor: Detailed Comparison
intro: MailerLite and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they cater to different audiences and use cases. MailerLite emphasizes affordability and ease of use for small businesses, while Campaign Monitor focuses on design quality and multi-brand management for agencies. Understanding their key differences will help you choose the right tool for your specific needs.
choose_a_if: You're a small business or freelancer with a limited budget
You want a free tier to get started without payment
You need e-commerce integrations and landing pages
choose_b_if: You manage multiple brands or client accounts
You prioritize beautiful email templates and design tools

faq.q: Is MailerLite better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. MailerLite excels for small businesses seeking affordability and simplicity, with a strong free tier and better user ratings. Campaign Monitor is superior for agencies managing multiple brands with advanced segmentation and transactional email features.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month with a free tier supporting up to 1,000 subscribers. Campaign Monitor has no free tier and starts at $11/month, making it less accessible for budget-conscious users.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support importing subscriber lists and email data. Most users can migrate their contacts and campaigns within hours, though you may need to rebuild automation workflows depending on complexity.
